section_title: The liability of the surety is co-extensive with that of the principal debtor,
content:
128. The liability of the surety is co-extensive with that of the principal debtor,
liability
unless it is otherwise provided by the contract.
Illustration
A guarantees to B the payment of a bill of exchange by C, the acceptor. The
bill is dishonoured by C. A is liable not only for the amount of the bill but also

for any interest and charges which may have become due on it.
"Continuing
illustrations:
A guarantees to B the payment of a bill of exchange by C, the acceptor. The
bill is dishonoured by C. A is liable not only for the amount of the bill but also

for any interest and charges which may have become due on it.
"Continuing
